name: Skewered Swordfish w/ Vegetables &Fresh Herbs (Gr)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound unsalted butter, at room temperature
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the swordfish steaks and vegetables with olive oil and lemon juice.
2. Alternate the swordfish and vegetables on skewers.
3. Let stand at room temperature for 20 minutes.
4. Prepare the grill.
5. Combine the herb butter ingredients in a small bowl and mix well; reserve.
6. Grill the skewers for 5 minutes on each side.
7. Remove from the grill and baste with the reserved herb butter.
Yield: 20 skewers
